steps.title: Use substitution to simplify
steps.content: Notice that $(2-4x)$ appears twice in the equation. Let $u = 2-4x$. The equation becomes: $$5 - 7u = 16 - 8u$$

steps.title: Solve for u
steps.content: Add $8u$ to both sides: $$5 + u = 16$$ Then subtract 5: $$u = 11$$ Therefore, $2-4x = 11$.
